text:
its surveillance capacity by using new technologies (Creemers, 2017; Hoffman,
2017). The data collection phase indicates that the SCS is adopting the “collecting
everything” approach to gathering large amounts of public and personal data.
These 400 data sets have been created to collect data from citizens, firms,
organizations, and government agencies in China, and 537 variables are adopted
to identify every aspect of each actor. Accordingly, the data collection phase
should be regarded as a multistakeholder mechanism that gathers and stores
everything from various official agencies.

Data Aggregation of the SCS
